name: oms:trace
command:
Load the "trace" skill by calling the `skill-execute` tool with `{ "skill": "oms/trace" }`, then follow the skill's SKILL.md instructions to investigate the target below per the skill's contract.

## Target

$ARGUMENTS
description: 证据驱动的因果调查——多假设竞争 + 6 级证据分级 + 反驳轮次。用法: /oms:trace <观察现象/待解释问题>
